title: Auto injector configured for automatic airshot
abstract: Disclosed are an auto injector and a system comprising an auto injector. The auto injector comprising: a housing; a receiving part configured for receiving a syringe containing a medicament; an operational module configured for interacting with the syringe, the operational module being configured for moving a first stopper of the syringe at least in a first stopper direction to expel medicament through a first syringe channel of the syringe; an orientation sensor configured to detect an orientation of the auto injector indicative of a corresponding orientation of the syringe and provide an orientation sensor signal indicative of the orientation of the syringe; an optical sensor configured to optically detect presence of medicament in the first syringe channel and provide an optical sensor signal indicative of presence of medicament in the first syringe channel; and a processing unit configured to receive the orientation sensor signal and the optical sensor signal, wherein the processing unit is configured to provide a control signal to the operational module based on the optical sensor signal and the orientation sensor signal.
claims: Claims 1 . An auto injector for administering injection of a medicament, the auto injector comprising: - a housing; - a receiving part configured for receiving a syringe containing the medicament; - an operational module configured for interacting with the syringe, the operational module being configured for moving a first stopper of the syringe at least in a first stopper direction to expel medicament through a first syringe channel of the syringe; - an orientation sensor configured to detect an orientation of the auto injector indicative of a corresponding orientation of the syringe and provide an orientation sensor signal indicative of the orientation of the syringe; - an optical sensor configured to optically detect presence of medicament in the first syringe channel and provide an optical sensor signal indicative of presence of medicament in the first syringe channel; and - a processing unit configured to receive the orientation sensor signal and the optical sensor signal, wherein the processing unit is configured to provide a control signal to the operational module based on the optical sensor signal and the orientation sensor signal. 2. Auto injector according to claim 1 , wherein the control signal is configured to cause the operational module to move the first stopper in the first stopper direction if the optical sensor signal indicates that medicament is not present in the first syringe channel and the orientation sensor signal indicates that the syringe has a predetermined orientation. 3. Auto injector according to any of claims 1 or 2, wherein the control signal is configured to cause the operational module to stop movement of the first stopper if the optical sensor signal indicates that medicament is present in the first syringe channel. 4. Auto injector according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the control signal is configured to cause the operational module to stop movement of the first stopper if the orientation sensor signal indicates that the syringe is not in a predetermined orientation. 5. Auto injector according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the operational module is configured to operate at least in a first operational mode and a second operational mode to move the first stopper in a first mode and a second mode, the rate of movement being decreased in the second mode. 6. Auto injector according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the orientation sensor is configured to detect if the orientation of the auto injector is indicative of the syringe being in a predetermined orientation, the predetermined orientation being an orientation wherein the syringe is orientated such that a syringe axis between a first syringe end of the syringe and a second syringe end of the syringe is within +/- 45 degrees of vertical and the first syringe channel of the syringe is in a vertical position above a compartment of the syringe, the compartment containing the medicament. 7. Auto injector according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the optical sensor is configured to detect presence of medicament in the first syringe channel such that air in the first syringe channel is between 0 and 0.3 ml when presence of medicament in the first syringe channel is detected. 8. Auto injector according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the optical sensor is configured to optically detect presence of medicament in the first syringe channel by detecting media having a reflection coefficient larger than the reflection coefficient of water in the first syringe channel. 9. Auto injector according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the orientation sensor comprises an accelerometer. 10. Auto injector according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the optical sensor comprises a light transmitter and a light receiver. 1 1 . Auto injector according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the first stopper movement is initiated by activation of the operational module, and wherein the movement of the first stopper is stopped or discontinued by de-activating the operational module. 12. Auto injector according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the operational module has a maximum threshold, and wherein the operational module is configured to stop movement of the first stopper when the maximum threshold is reached. 13. Auto injector according to claim 12, wherein the maximum threshold is determined according to a time factor, a movement factor, an operational module factor, such as an operational module movement factor. 14. Auto injector according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the operational module comprises an electric motor. 15. A system comprising an auto injector and a syringe containing a medicament, the syringe comprising a compartment configured for containing the medicament the syringe having a first syringe end and a second syringe end, the syringe having a first syringe channel in fluid communication with the compartment at the first syringe end, the syringe comprising a first stopper movable inside the compartment at least in a first stopper direction from the second syringe end towards the first syringe end, the syringe being configured to expel medicament through the first syringe channel, the auto injector comprising: - a housing; - a receiving part configured for receiving the syringe; - an operational module configured for interacting with the syringe, the operational module being configured for moving the first stopper at least in the first stopper direction to expel medicament through the first syringe channel; - an orientation sensor configured to detect an orientation of the auto injector indicative of a corresponding orientation of the syringe and provide an orientation sensor signal indicative of the orientation of the syringe; - an optical sensor configured to optically detect presence of medicament in the first syringe channel and provide an optical sensor signal indicative of presence of medicament in the first syringe channel; and - a processing unit configured to receive the orientation sensor signal and the optical sensor signal, wherein the processing unit is configured to provide a control signal to the operational module based on the optical sensor signal and the orientation sensor signal. 16. System according to claim 15, wherein the system comprises a cartridge comprising the syringe, and wherein the receiving part is configured for receiving the cartridge comprising the syringe.
